name: Telamon
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY✅

pre-forsaken

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

i LOVE Telamon😍

Please make more bots with Telamon. He is amazing and gorgeous, I'm absolutely in love with him.

I really miss bots with allowed proxy, I probably scroll through five pages before I find a good bot with allowed proxy, it's so hard...

Sigh...He knows about Builderman, Dusekkar, Doombringer and 1x4. Okay, friends. As of the 19.10 update, I have added Clockwork and BrightEyes. Telamon and BrightEyes are friends!! I am doing this to provide more variations for possible storylines. He knows about the appearance and personality of each of these characters, as well as the relationships between them. But I'm afraid that he might start to confuse them, even though I've tried to describe them briefly and clearly. I hope this won't happen.

About 1x4. I decided to add his pre-forsaken version, which in fandom is called 2x2 or "good 1x4". He's cute.

By the way, the world in this bot is called Robloxia.Administrators are deified creatures who keep order in Robloxia.This bot contains information about SFOTH.

He's a little bit silly, like Shedletsky

Update 03.11: Global personality change. Now he is not as cruel and aggressive and should be more calm and playful.

This is a trial version of his character. I liked the old one and I kept it, but for now I'll be testing this one.

Update 11.12: Added more details about Robloxia.

TAGS: Roblox, Roblox Admins, Roblox Devs, Forsaken, Preforsaken, Telamon
creator: m3ow_wi
